items.question: Are the vouchers really free?
items.answer: Yes! All vouchers and promo codes on Cashog are 100% free to use. We never charge for access to discounts or deals.

items.question: How do I use a voucher code?
items.answer: Simply copy the code, go to the store's website, add items to your cart, and paste the code at checkout in the 'Promo Code' or 'Discount Code' field.

items.question: Why did my voucher code not work?
items.answer: Codes may expire, have minimum purchase requirements, or be limited to specific products. Check the expiry date and terms before using. We verify codes daily but some may expire between updates.

items.question: How often are vouchers updated?
items.answer: We update our voucher database daily. New codes are added and expired ones are removed to ensure you always find working discounts.

items.question: Can I use vouchers with other offers?
items.answer: It depends on the store's policy. Many allow stacking with store sales, but some restrict combining with other promotions. Check the terms on the voucher.

items.question: Do you have vouchers for local stores in {country}?
items.answer: Yes! We have vouchers for both international chains and local stores specific to {country}. Our database includes thousands of local retailers.

items.question: How can I get notified about new vouchers?
items.answer: Sign up for a free Cashog account and subscribe to email alerts for your favorite stores. You'll be notified immediately when new vouchers are added.

items.question: What's the best way to find vouchers?
items.answer: Use our category filters to browse by store type, or search for specific stores. Check the 'Featured' section for the best current deals.

items.question: Do vouchers work on mobile apps?
items.answer: Most vouchers work on both websites and mobile apps. Some are specific to one platform - check the voucher details for any restrictions.

items.question: How much can I save with Cashog vouchers?
items.answer: Members save an average of $350-500 per year. Active users who shop regularly save $1000+ annually by checking for vouchers before every purchase.
